title: stephanomeria fluminea
intro: Stephanomeria fluminea, also known as the flumed or flumed pincushion, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as supporting the immune system and improving respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Stephanomeria fluminea is often used as a dried flower or root, and can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
